iterations.theme: The Imperative of Cordon Sanitaire: A Strategy to Overcome HDZ's Dominance and Opposition's Fragmentation
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration covers the entire discussion, as the transcript is too short to be meaningfully divided into 35-45 minute blocks without cutting mid-topic. The entire transcript focuses on a single overarching theme.
